doc.field: Jasmine Soliman and Jonathan Burr for Akkasah: Photography Archive at NYUAD
'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection
'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection
'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection

Three postcards. Top: Abydos: Sethos offering to the Sacred Boats (a relief in the Temple of Sethos depicting Sethos' offering of the sacred boats). Bottom Left: (No.1566) Denderah: The Temple of the Goddess Hathor. Bottom Right: Abydos: Part of the Temple of Sethos I (a man sitting at the base of a column in the Temple of of Sethos I).
'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection
'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection

'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection >> Three postcards. Top: Abydos: Sethos offering to the Sacred Boats (a relief in the Temple of Sethos depicting Sethos' offering of the sacred boats). Bottom Left: (No.1566) Denderah: The Temple of the Goddess Hathor. Bottom Right: Abydos: Part of the Temple of Sethos I (a man sitting at the base of a column in the Temple of of Sethos I).
'Egypt and Sudan Post Card Album' compiled by Edith and William P. Lincoln - Hisham Khatib Collection

Three postcards. Top: Abydos: Sethos offering to the Sacred Boats (a relief in the Temple of Sethos depicting Sethos' offering of the sacred boats). Bottom Left: (No.1566) Denderah: The Temple of the Goddess Hathor. Bottom Right: Abydos: Part of the Temple of Sethos I (a man sitting at the base of a column in the Temple of of Sethos I).

Three postcards. Top: Abydos: Sethos offering to the Sacred Boats (a relief in the Temple of Sethos depicting Sethos' offering of the sacred boats). Bottom Left: (No.1566) Denderah: The Temple of the Goddess Hathor. Bottom Right: Abydos: Part of the Temple of Sethos I (a man sitting at the base of a column in the Temple of of Sethos I).
